message.reasoning_content:

3. Rewrite src/pages/Dashboard.tsx with at least 2000 chars of new content.

Now, for creating files: Metrics.tsx is new, and it might be large (at least 3000 chars), so I need to check if it's over 5KB. 3000 chars is about 3KB, so it should be fine with a single write_file action via grok-proxy.

I have to be careful with the order and waiting times.

Rule 4: Before writing App.tsx, ALWAYS read src/index.tsx first. So, when I get to step 4, I need to read src/index.tsx before updating App.tsx.

The task says src/components/App.tsx, so I should verify that.

For all edits, after each one, wait 15 seconds and check console errors.

Finally, end with git operations and verification.
